steps.title: Identify the given slope
steps.content:
Line $p$ is written as
$$y=5x+\frac{1}{8}$$
so its slope is $5$.

steps.title: Use the perpendicular slope
steps.content:
Perpendicular lines have slopes that are negative reciprocals. With $m=5$, the perpendicular slope is
$$-\frac{1}{5}$$
The answer is B.
